user_claim: Customer: Hi, I noticed a scratch on my car's front bumper after parking at the mall. | Support: Can you point to where exactly? | Customer: Lower left of the front bumper, a long scratch. | Support: Just a surface scratch, or is the bumper cracked? | Customer: Just a scratch. Photo attached.

Customer: My laptop arrived with a key missing from the keyboard. | Support: Which key, and is it just the keycap or the whole switch? | Customer: The right shift key is gone. | Support: Any other damage to the device? | Customer: No, only that key. I uploaded two photos.
